sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91784" key="puroklopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρο-κλοπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">theft of fire,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.100</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author></bibl>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυρι-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
